unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */

function.name: Curl_win32_random
randit

unit.comment: /* * Curl_rand() stores 'num' number of random unsigned characters in the buffer * 'rnd' points to. * * If libcurl is built without TLS support or with a TLS backend that lacks a * proper random API (rustls or mbedTLS), this function will use "weak" * random. * * When built *with* TLS support and a backend that offers strong random, it * will return error if it cannot provide strong random values. * * NOTE: 'data' may be passed in as NULL when coming from external API without * easy handle! * */

function.name: Curl_rand

unit.comment: /* * Curl_rand_hex() fills the 'rnd' buffer with a given 'num' size with random * hexadecimal digits PLUS a null-terminating byte. It must be an odd number * size. */

function.name: Curl_rand_hex

unit.comment: /* * Curl_rand_alnum() fills the 'rnd' buffer with a given 'num' size with random * alphanumerical chars PLUS a null-terminating byte. */

function.name: Curl_rand_alnum
